arts.ttl: Brighton ‘in pole position’ for signing despite concrete talks with Aston Villa and Tottenham
arts.sum: Brighton & Hove Albion, Aston Villa and Tottenham Hotspur are among the clubs chasing 1. FC Nürnberg’s Stefanos Tzimas. On January 18th, Bild reported Unai Emery’s side and Spurs are keen on signing the 19-year-old.
